title: China will replace US dominance through win-win not warmongering. With Professor Jiang Xuejin
full_text: Good morning everybody. My name is Ian Proud. I am the peacem and I'm absolutely delighted this morning to welcome on the show uh professor Xiang Shuin um who is incredibly well known uh for his massively popular predictive history podcast where he takes lessons from the past from from my history and and applies them forward to the future to make really kind of viral projections which you know often prove to be to be correct. So I want to kind of stay on that theme for the purpose of today's discussion and first to kick off thank you professor Jiang for joining us today. >> Thanks again for having me. So it seems clear to me particularly now under the Trump administration that that the US is racing towards the end of its global hedgemonic status if you like u both in political terms but also in economic terms uh and at some point uh over the next one or two decades China will surpass the US as the the leading global economic power.
